narrative:
Precinct Martins Ferry 3-A (precinct in Belmont County) has 291 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.8 percentage points.
